race.comment: PULA (5) is hard to knock on her recent form and gets the blinkers on for the first time today as she drops back to the mile. She's shown good early speed, so expect her to be prominent in the run for Neindorf. Can dictate from the front and get back to winning ways. COOLY (4) was impressive on the Caulfield Heath last time out when sitting handy and getting away late to win by 1.5L. This looks to map favourably for her once again and she can continue her rise through the grades. PERFECT TEN (9) finished behind COOLY last time out but was only second-up there and still has improvement to come. She gets a weight pull on COOLY now and a much better gate today should see her closer in the run. Can turn the tables without surprising. STREET LARK (10) ticks plenty of boxes now third-up into the campaign and she jumped favourite in the race COOLY won. That looks a strong form reference for this and she can't be left out of calculations.
